argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const aweme_id = "{{ aweme_id }}"; const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000); const sevenDaysAgo = now - 7 * 86400; const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/janus/douyin/creator/data/item_analysis/metrics_trend'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ aweme_id: aweme_id, start_time: sevenDaysAgo, end_time: now, metrics: ['play_count', 'like_count', 'comment_count', 'share_count'] }) }).then(r => r.json()); const data = res.data ?? {}; return Object.entries(data).map(([metric, value]) => ({ metric, value })); }
